## Problem

What workflow problem would this solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler workaround or configuration option.

## Compatibility notes

Mention any Windows, AutoHotkey, keyboard, mouse, or target-app constraints.
